headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Vistra (VST) After Its Strong Three Year Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Vistra's current share price still reflects good value, it helps to step back and look at what the market has been pricing in lately. The stock last closed at US$158.95, with returns of 0.2% over 7 days, a 0.7% decline over 30 days, a 3.8% decline year to date, and a 28.4% gain over the past year. The 3 year and 5 year returns have been very large. Recent coverage of Vistra has focused on its role as a major US utilities player and the ongoing interest in...
